title: Read data.txt and run echo HELLO_FROM_AGY
notes: Antigravity (agy) conversation read from brain/<uuid>/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl. Housekeeping SYSTEM steps (CONVERSATION_HISTORY, EPHEMERAL_MESSAGE) are dropped. The USER_REQUEST envelope is unwrapped for the title/content. A tool-only PLANNER_RESPONSE surfaces via its tool_calls plus thinking fallback. model_name is pinned to the mandated agy model.
